message:
chore: update Cargo.lock dependency versions

Routine dependency version bumps via cargo resolution:
- anyhow 1.0.101 → 1.0.102
- chrono 0.4.43 → 0.4.44
- deranged 0.5.6 → 0.5.8
- js-sys 0.3.85 → 0.3.88
- linux-raw-sys 0.11.0 → 0.12.1
- pulldown-cmark 0.13.0 → 0.13.1
- rustix 1.1.3 → 1.1.4
- syn 2.0.116 → 2.0.117

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
